note: 8C-1 CBraMod primary / CodeBrain exploratory. See slope summary + trends; interpretation per FSR_48 v2 grid.
cbramod_scaling_signal: sample_size (growing +0.036 N>=16-driven; fixed no-DETECTABLE-effect over {2,4,8} underpowered)
l1_trend_primary: ~0.95 FIXED property of the frozen encoder (training/condition/N-INDEPENDENT by design; ceiling-saturated) -> NOT a diversity finding; design cannot test whether diversity erases subjects
l5_reliance_trend_primary: subject-subspace erasure NEVER materially helps the task at any N (abs L5~0; beats variance null only 4/22 gated cells) -> subject encoded != task lever, extends 8B to scaling
headline: Frozen PhysioNetMI (WEAK task, chance 0.5->peak 0.64): transfer improves modestly with more source TRIALS (sample-size, N>=16-driven); fixed-trials shows NO DETECTABLE diversity benefit over {2,4,8} (underpowered null). Subject-subspace erasure NEVER helps the task at any N (extends 8B 'subject encoded != task lever'). Pairwise-L1 ~0.95 is a FIXED frozen-encoder property (N-independent by design) -> this frozen design CANNOT test diversity-erasure. Only real effect = sample-size; diversity + reliance-scaling NULL/untestable.
caveats: task WEAK on PhysioNetMI frozen (target 0.52-0.60, gate pass cbramod 0.52 / codebrain 0.39) -> L4/L5/L6 on gated ~half of cells; similar to BNCI not SHU-MI
fixed-trials only {2,4,8} (3 points); growing includes leveraged N=all
CodeBrain exploratory (gate 0.39): same direction, weaker task
proceed_note: Interesting FSR claims (subject-DIVERSITY effect, reliance scaling) are NULL; only signal is sample-size (mundane) + persistent L1 + flat L5. Per PM: null-for-diversity -> do NOT add specialist baselines.
ci_caveat: slope CIs are CELL-LEVEL not clustered by the shared 15-target panel -> over-precise; signs robust, magnitudes lower-bounds
design_limit: pairwise-L1 in fixed source-pool PCA + frozen encoder is N-independent by construction; a real diversity test needs a TRAINED representation (out of scope: frozen audit, no fine-tuning)
verifier: agent a354e783: all numbers reproduce, firewall CLEAN (all 41 subsets zero panel subjects); MAJOR-1 (L1 design-guaranteed) + MAJOR-2 (CI un-clustered) + MAJOR-3 (fixed underpowered) + MAJOR-4 (N-range confound) applied
